I MUST NOT invent a threshold. I will use ORDER BY lastReading ASC LIMIT 5 to find the cleanest zones and their attractions | VALIDATE: ✓ no invented thresholds, used sorting instead

question: I want to spend a nice afternoon out. Where in the city has clean air, something interesting to see, and parking available?

execution_plan.reasoning: DECOMPOSE: find zones with clean air (air_quality sensors with low readings), open tourist attractions, and available parking spots | MAP: smart-environment-and-temperature-sensors-mock / GET /sensor (filter sensorType=air_quality), smart-tourist-attractions-mock / GET /attraction (filter status=open), smart-parking-mock / GET /parking-spot (filter available=true) | CHAIN: SQL join over three datasets on zoneId | COMBINE: sql join task_get_air_sensors, task_get_attractions, task_get_parking | FILTER: air_quality sensors (no threshold invented, use min reading via SQL), status=open for attractions, available=true for parking | VALIDATE: ✓ no invented thresholds, used SQL aggregation/ranking for 'cleanest'

input.sql_query: SELECT a.zoneId, MIN(s.lastReading) as min_air_reading, COUNT(DISTINCT att.id) as attraction_count, COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as parking_count FROM task_get_air_sensors s JOIN task_get_attractions att ON s.zoneId = att.zoneId JOIN task_get_parking p ON s.zoneId = p.zoneId GROUP BY a.zoneId ORDER BY min_air_reading ASC LIMIT 5

question: I'm driving in for a bit of sightseeing. Where should I go to avoid heavy traffic, find something to visit, and park easily?

execution_plan.reasoning: DECOMPOSE: find zones with low traffic congestion, find open tourist attractions, find available parking spots | MAP: smart-traffic-monitoring-mock / GET /traffic-sensor (congestionLevel=low), smart-tourist-attractions-mock / GET /attraction (status=open), smart-parking-mock / GET /parking-spot (status=free) | CHAIN: SQL join over three datasets on zoneId | COMBINE: sql join get_low_traffic_zones, get_open_attractions, get_free_parking | FILTER: congestionLevel=low, status=open, status=free | VALIDATE: ✓

input.sql_query: SELECT DISTINCT t.zoneId, a.name AS attraction_name, a.category, p.location AS parking_location FROM get_low_traffic_zones t JOIN get_open_attractions a ON t.zoneId = a.zoneId JOIN get_free_parking p ON t.zoneId = p.zoneId

question: I'm in a wheelchair and want to go out today. I need somewhere accessible, with decent air quality and a parking spot.

execution_plan.reasoning: DECOMPOSE: wheelchair-accessible attractions, air quality sensors, parking spots | MAP: smart-tourist-attractions-mock / GET /attraction (wheelchairAccessible=true), smart-environment-and-temperature-sensors-mock / GET /sensor (sensorType=air_quality), smart-parking-mock / GET /parking-spot (available=true) | CHAIN: none | COMBINE: sql join task_attractions and task_sensors and task_parking_spots on zoneId | FILTER: wheelchairAccessible=true, sensorType=air_quality, available=true | VALIDATE: ✓

input.sql_query: SELECT a.id as attraction_id, a.name, a.zoneId, a.address, s.lastReading as air_quality_reading, p.id as parking_id, p.location as parking_location FROM get_accessible_attractions a JOIN get_air_quality_sensors s ON a.zoneId = s.zoneId JOIN get_available_parking p ON a.zoneId = p.zoneId

question: Which parts of the city are in the worst shape right now, with street lights off, full bins, and traffic problems all at once?

execution_plan.reasoning: DECOMPOSE: find zones with lights off, bins full, and traffic problems (critical congestion or incidents) | MAP: smart-lighting-mock / GET /light (status=off), smart-bins-mock / GET /bin (status=full), smart-traffic-monitoring-mock / GET /traffic-sensor (congestionLevel=critical OR incidentDetected=true) | CHAIN: SQL join/intersect on zoneId | COMBINE: sql set_intersection over get_off_lights, get_full_bins, get_traffic_issues | FILTER: status=off, status=full, congestionLevel=critical, incidentDetected=true | VALIDATE: ✓

input.sql_query: SELECT l.zoneId FROM get_off_lights l INNER JOIN get_full_bins b ON l.zoneId = b.zoneId INNER JOIN (SELECT zoneId FROM get_traffic_issues UNION SELECT zoneId FROM get_traffic_incidents) t ON l.zoneId = t.zoneId

question: The city feels chaotic today. Where is there heavy congestion, delayed public transport, and few emergency units available?

execution_plan.reasoning: DECOMPOSE: find zones with heavy congestion, delayed transport, and low emergency unit availability | MAP: smart-traffic-monitoring-mock / GET /traffic-sensor (congestionLevel=critical), smart-public-transport-mock / GET /vehicle (status=delayed), smart-emergency-services-mock / GET /emergency-unit (available=false) | CHAIN: SQL join/aggregate over three GET results | COMBINE: sql join task_traffic_sensors, task_delayed_vehicles, task_unavailable_units to find common zones and rank by severity | FILTER: congestionLevel=critical, status=delayed, available=false | VALIDATE: ✓

input.sql_query: SELECT t.zoneId, COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) as congestion_count, COUNT(DISTINCT v.id) as delayed_count, COUNT(DISTINCT u.id) as unavailable_count FROM task_traffic_sensors t JOIN task_delayed_vehicles v ON t.zoneId = v.zoneId JOIN task_unavailable_units u ON t.zoneId = u.zoneId GROUP BY t.zoneId ORDER BY congestion_count DESC, delayed_count DESC, unavailable_count DESC

question: I want somewhere calm to go, with something to do and a place to park. What would you suggest?

execution_plan.reasoning: DECOMPOSE: find quiet zones (low noise), find open attractions in those zones, find free parking in those zones | MAP: smart-environment-and-temperature-sensors-mock (noise sensors), smart-tourist-attractions-mock (attractions), smart-parking-mock (parking) | CHAIN: SQL join over three datasets | COMBINE: sql join task_get_noise_sensors, task_get_attractions, task_get_parking | FILTER: noise sensors (sensorType=noise), attractions (status=open), parking (status=free) | VALIDATE: ✓

input.sql_query: SELECT n.zoneId, n.lastReading AS noiseLevel, a.name AS attractionName, a.category AS attractionCategory, p.location AS parkingLocation FROM task_get_noise_sensors n JOIN task_get_attractions a ON n.zoneId = a.zoneId JOIN task_get_parking p ON n.zoneId = p.zoneId ORDER BY n.lastReading ASC LIMIT 5
